zh.Sanford, Whitchurch, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾其其
zh.Askham, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德阿斯哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Sandford於1199年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾其其時，他的父親Thomas de Sanford33歲，母親Amabil Cardiff30歲。他於大約1219年與Beatrix de Vanne在英國維斯特莫藍德阿斯哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1250年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.Sanford, Whitchurch, Shropshire, England: 英国英格兰史洛普爾其其
zh-hans.Askham, Westmorland, England: 英国維斯特莫藍德阿斯哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Sandford于1199年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾其其时，他的父亲Thomas de Sanford33岁，母亲Amabil Cardiff30岁。他于大约1219年与Beatrix de Vanne在英国維斯特莫藍德阿斯哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1250年在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sandford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Sandford was born in 1199, in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas de Sanford, was 33 and his mother, Amabil Cardiff, was 30. He married Beatrix de Vanne about 1219, in Askham, Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1250, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Sandford est né en 1199, à Whitchurch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Sanford, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Amabil Cardiff, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Beatrix de Vanne environ 1219, à Askham, Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1250, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Sandford 1199 in Whitchurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Sanford 33 und seine Mutter Amabil Cardiff 30. Er hat um 1219 in Askham, Westmorland, England Beatrix de Vanne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1250 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Sandford è nato il nel 1199 nel Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas de Sanford, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Amabil Cardiff, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Beatrix de Vanne circa 1219, nel Askham, Westmorland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1250, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Sandfordが1199年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィトチャーチで生まれた時，父Thomas de Sanfordは33歳，母Amabil Cardiffは30歳であった。約1219年にイギリスウエストモーランドアスクハムでBeatrix de Vanneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1250年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Sandford(이)가 1199년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘트c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Sanford(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Amabil Cardiff(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1219년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 아스카에서 Beatrix de Vanne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1250년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Sandford nasceu em 1199, em Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Sanford, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Amabil Cardiff, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrix de Vanne aproximadamente 1219, em Askham, Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1250, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Sandford родился в 1199 г. в местности уичурч, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas de Sanford было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Amabil Cardiff, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrix de Vanne около 1219 г. в местности асхам, вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1250 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Sandford nació en 1199, en Whitchurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Sanford, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Amabil Cardiff, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Beatrix de Vanne aproximadamente 1219, en Askham, Westmorland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1250, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
